titleStmt.title: SII 22.43: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 43. (A.R. No. 43 of 1906) TANJAVUR DISTRICT, MAYURAM TALUK, TIRUKKAḌAIYŪR. AMṚITAGHAṬĒŚVARA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. PAR. KULŌTTUṄGA-CHŌḶA III.—16th YEAR. (A.D. 1193-4)

summary.p: The details of the date are given as Mēsha, Śu. 8, Thursday, Pushya, corresponding to A.D. 1194, March 31.
This records the same transaction mentioned in No. 42 above, which is here addressed to the concerned officers nilavāriyaṉ and nilakkaṇakkaṉ evidently for the purpose of entry in their tax registers.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . puyal vāyppa vaḷam peruka poyyāta nānmaṟaiyin ceyal vāyppat tirumakaḷum ceyamakaḷum ciṟantu vāḻa veṇmatipoṟ kuṭai viḷaṅka velventar Aṭivaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻait toṅka cakkaramuñ ceṅkolum tikkaṉaittum ce
l naṭappa kaṟpakālam puvikākka poṟpamainta muṭipuṉaintu taṇṭonṟāl virapāṇṭiyaṉai mukkarintu vikkiramapāṇṭiyaṟku kūṭamānakar kuṭuttu miṇṭapin Eṭuttu vanta paripavattāl Etirttu vanta virapāṇṭiyaṉai muṭittalai koṇṭamar muṭittu Aṭutta mutal putalvaraṟṟu kuṭakollam pukka ten
naṉu mikka ceraṉum vantu Aṭivaṇaṅka Avaṉ muṭimel Aṭivaittu centamiḻ nāṭṭaraicum mavuliyum tennavaṉukkaḷittaruḷi virakkaḻal puṉaintu virakkoṭit tiyākakkoṭi Uṭan Eṭuttu kaiykaiyarkon kātalaṉaip perkāṭṭak kaṇṭaruḷi Eytariya
paricaṭṭam Irunetiyum peritu nalki miṉavaril virakeraḷan veḷaikoṇṭu viṟattaṟittu tānaṭimai pukututalāl tarātipar peṟā vāḻvaḷittu pakkattil Iruntuṇṇap parikala pariccinnam nalki tikkeṭṭum Eval keṭṭu cakkaraveṟpil pukaḻ Eṟiya cempoṉ viraciṅkātaṉattu
puvaṉamuḻutum Uṭaiyāḷḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecaripaṟmarāṉa tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉaiyum muṭittalai koṇṭaruḷiya śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 6vatu meṣanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣattu Aṭṭamiyum
viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa pūcattināḷ ceyaṅkoṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu Ākkūrnāṭṭu Amparnāṭu Uḷp paṭa meviya tirukkaṭavūr makāsapaip perumakkaḷ paṇi . nammūril nilavāriyaṉum nilakkaṇakkaṉum kaṇṭu Uṭaiyār śrīkālakālatevar koyil melait tirumāḷikaiyil Amparu
ṭaiyār Araiyar Irācarācatevaṉnāṉa vāṇātarāyar Ulakuṭaiyanāyanār tirumeni kalliyāṇatirumeṉiyāka Eḻuntaruḷuvitta Uṭaiyār Irācarāca Īśvaramuṭaiyārkku tiruppaṭimāṟṟukku Uṭalāka Uṭaiyār śrīkālakālatevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāy Ūrār māvintu kaṭamai Iṟuttu varu
kiṟaviḷai nilam 1- li Innilam veliyum Ittevaṟkku 10 6 pacāṉmutal kācukoḷḷāta Iṟaiyiliyāka viṭṭom Innilattu Iṟaiyāl vanta nellu Ūrile Iṟuttukkoḷḷakkaṭavatākap paṇṇi Innilam Oḻukilum parappilum Iṟaiyiliyāka māṭṭeṟintu kallilum cempilum
veṭṭikkoḷḷakkaṭavatākap paṇṇuka paṇiyāl Ūrkaṇakkut tiruk kaṭavūrppiriyan Eḻuttu Ivai comattiyan kalaiyan kālakālatevan Eḻuttu Ivai comattiyan tevan kalaiyan Eḻuttu Ivai Omayintan paṭaiyan kaṇṇār Uṇmaṇi Eḻuttu Ivai mokiliyan viraṭṭan kumaraṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai comattiyaṉ pāṇi nilan Eḻuttu Ivai comattiyan centan kālaviṉotan Eḻuttu Ivai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān cūriyatevan Eḻuttu Ivai centan Āḷavantān Eḻuttu Ivai kalayan śrīnantiśvaran Eḻuttu Ivai pukkatuṟai vallapappirammārāyar Eḻuttu
Ivai Iḷaiyakalayan śrīnantiśvaran Eḻuttu Ivai Upaiyakulakaṇṭap pirammārāyan Eḻuttu Ivai tātan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai Omayintan paṭaiyan nilan Eḻuttu Ivai periyanampipaṭṭan Eḻuttu Ivai pāratāyaṉ kaṇṇan kumaraṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai tevan śrīnantiśvaran Eḻuttu Ivai mokiliyan tāyan pāṇi Eḻuttu Ivai comattiyan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān takṣaṇāmuttipaṣṭan Eḻuttu Ivai paṭaiyan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai śrīnantiśvara paṭṭan Eḻuttu Ivai Omayintan kalaiyan nilan Eḻuttu
Ivai mokiliyan viraṭṭan pāṇi Eḻuttu Ivai comattiyaṉ Iḷaiya tevan centaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai comattiyaṉ kumaraṉ kumaraṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Omayintanpaṭaiyan vaṭukaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai comattiyan cantiracekaran centan Eḻuttu Ivai Āttrayan kāṭaṉ tevaṉ Eḻuttu
Ivai Aruḷākaranampi Eḻuttu Ivai tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān kalaiyan Eḻuttu Ivai tirukkaṇṇapuramuṭaiyān pālai Eḻuttu Ivai pūtan tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai kāṭan tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyān Eḻuttu Ivai centaṉ tātaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kaṇ
ṇaṉ centaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai periya perumāḷ nampi Eḻuttu ḥ ...
Digital edition of SII 22.43 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
